expert_spec.name: minimal_stress_pair_context_formula_expert
expert_spec.entry: funding relief OR premium discount after train-only quantiles
expert_spec.design: core + source + core*source + each context low/high responsibility and core interactions
expert_spec.target: absolute risk-adjusted utility for each executable action; neutral utility is zero
expert_spec.selection_rule: absolute selection gate and lexicographically beat long time-only base
